prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your business launch forward
items: Research and choose the appropriate business structure (LLC, corporation, sole proprietorship) for your venture
Register your business name and obtain all required licenses and permits for your industry and location
Obtain an Employer Identification Number (EIN) from the IRS and set up basic business accounting records
Create a basic legal compliance checklist covering contracts, terms of service, and privacy policy requirements
